title: The Iron Sequence
description: The golem has been tested with 4 ingredients. Deduce the reaction pattern and identify the target group.

hints.text:
The golem reacts to SIZE on a specific color channel.
Known tests:
  ing7: chest=✓ ears=✓  →  animators
  ing6: chest=✗ ears=✓  →  ears_only
  ing4: chest=✗ ears=✗  →  non_reactive
  ing5: chest=✓ ears=✗  →  chest_only
Chest reacts to G+L. Ears react to R+L. An animator needs BOTH. Cross-reference with untested ingredients.
The animators are: ingredients [7, 8]. Alch: ing7→NNN, ing8→PPP.
